CalculateField "Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" MinVoltCat '115 to 229' Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" MinVoltCat '69 to 115' Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" MinVoltCat '69 to 114' Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" MaxVoltInt round(!max_volt!) Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" MinVoltInt round(!min_volt!) Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" MaxTxt !MaxVoltInt! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" MinTxt !MinVoltInt! Python # Text NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

CalculateField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" NameUnique !Name_Prop! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" ExistNew 'New build' PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" ExistNew 'Existing' PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" HIFLD !ChangeType! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
DeleteField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" ChangeType DELETE_FIELDS

CalculateField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" SubID SequentialNumber() PYTHON3 "# Calculates a sequential number # More calculator examples at esriurl.com/CalculatorExamples rec=0 def SequentialNumber(): global rec pStart = 1 pInterval = 1 if (rec == 0): rec = pStart else: rec = rec + pInterval return rec" TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" SubID 'R'+!SubID! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" HIFLD_ID !id! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" HIFLD_ID !id! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing and planned substations in planned projects" HIFLD_Name !name! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" StateShort !state! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" Name !Name_Prop! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" CurrentMax !MaxTxt! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField "Existing Transmission\Electrical substations\electric_substations_moredetailed" CurrentMin !MinTxt! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
